title: Extend patterns
description: Practice using a table to extend addition and subtraction patterns.
topic_path: Get ready for ratios, rates, and percentages

assessment_items.question_content:
The table uses the following two patterns.

Pattern $x$: Starting number: $10$, Rule: add $5$

Pattern $y$: Starting number: $2$, Rule: add $1$

**Complete the table for the given patterns.** 

$x$ | $y$ 
:-: | :-: 
$10$ | $2$
 [[☃ numeric-input 1]]| [[☃ numeric-input 2]]
 [[☃ numeric-input 3]] |  [[☃ numeric-input 4]]
hints:
For the $x$ pattern, we add $5$ more for each row.

For the $y$ pattern, we add $1$ more for each row.

Pattern $x$: Add $\goldE5$

$\begin{align}\text{Starting term}&: \blueE{10}\\\\
\text{Term 2}&:\blueE{10}+\goldE5=\maroonE{15}\\\\
\text{Term 3}&:\maroonE{15}+\goldE5=\purpleD{20}\end{align}$

Pattern $y$: Add $\tealE{1}$

$\begin{align}\text{Starting term}&: \blueE2\\\\
\text{Term 2}&:\blueE2+\tealE{1}=\maroonE{3}\\\\
\text{Term 3}&:\maroonE{3}+\tealE{1}=\purpleD{4}\end{align}$

Our table of values should look like this:

$x$ | $y$ 
- | - | -
$10$ | $2$ 
$15$ | $3$ 
$20$ | $4$

assessment_items.question_content:
The table uses the following two patterns.

Pattern $x$: Starting number: $2$, Rule: add $4$

Pattern $y$: Starting number: $8$, Rule: add $16$

**Complete the table for the given patterns.**

:-: | :-: 
$2$ | $8$
 [[☃ numeric-input 1]]| [[☃ numeric-input 2]]
 [[☃ numeric-input 3]] |  [[☃ numeric-input 4]]
hints:
For the $x$ pattern, we add $4$ more to each row.

For the $y$ pattern, we add $16$ more to each row.

Pattern $x$: Add $\goldE{4}$

$\begin{align}\text{Starting term}&: \blueE{2}\\\\
\text{Term 2}&:\blueE{2} + \goldE{4}=\maroonE{6}\\\\
\text{Term 3}&:\maroonE{6} + \goldE{4}=\purpleD{10}\end{align}$

Pattern $y$: Add $\tealE{16}$

$\begin{align}\text{Starting term}&: \blueE{8}\\\\
\text{Term 2}&:\blueE{8} + \tealE{16}=\maroonE{24}\\\\
\text{Term 3}&:\maroonE{24} + \tealE{16}=\purpleD{40}\end{align}$

Our table of values should look like this:

$x$ | $y$ 
- | - | -
$2$ | $8$ 
$6$ | $24$ 
$10$ | $40$

assessment_items.question_content:
The table uses the following two patterns.

Pattern $x$: Starting number: $15$, Rule: subtract $6$

Pattern $y$: Starting number: $10$, Rule: subtract $4$

**Complete the table for the given patterns.** 

$x$ | $y$ 
:-: | :-: 
$15$ | $10$
 [[☃ numeric-input 1]]| [[☃ numeric-input 2]]
 [[☃ numeric-input 3]] |  [[☃ numeric-input 4]]
hints:
For the $x$ pattern, we subtract $6$ from each row.

For the $y$ pattern, we subtract $4$ from each row.

Pattern $x$: Subtract $\goldE{6}$

$\begin{align}\text{Starting term}&: \blueE{15}\\\\
\text{Term 2}&:\blueE{15} - \goldE{6}=\maroonE{9}\\\\
\text{Term 3}&:\maroonE{9} - \goldE{6}=\purpleD{3}\end{align}$

Pattern $y$: Subtract $\tealE{4}$

$\begin{align}\text{Starting term}&: \blueE{10}\\\\
\text{Term 2}&:\blueE{10} - \tealE{4}=\maroonE{6}\\\\
\text{Term 3}&:\maroonE{6} - \tealE{4}=\purpleD{2}\end{align}$

Our table of values should look like this:

$x$ | $y$ 
- | - | -
$15$ | $10$ 
$9$ | $6$ 
$3$ | $2$
